creator: charles@ghur.net
text:
libtorrent is badly out of date, and emails to maintainer result in no response.

Fix: eklo:~/port/libtorrent>diff -u /usr/ports/net-p2p/libtorrent/distinfo distinfo
eklo:~/port/libtorrent>diff -u /usr/ports/net-p2p/libtorrent/Makefile Makefile


PORTNAME?=     libtorrent
-PORTVERSION?=  0.12.9
+PORTVERSION?=  0.13.2
 CATEGORIES=    net-p2p
 MASTER_SITES=  http://libtorrent.rakshasa.no/downloads/ \
                ${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}--MdG2275jREGP0zyQQp9oVjRcq58081qrLkWGryEBbmhDXDDW
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- /usr/ports/net-p2p/libtorrent/distinfo      2011-07-18 07:07:45.000000000 -0700
+++ distinfo    2012-05-23 08:12:52.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libtorrent-0.12.9.tar.gz) = 15dc9e8dd45d070f447e599bef08ef0ca421bac6e7f55e608dcd19360594af64
-SIZE (libtorrent-0.12.9.tar.gz) = 667864
+SHA256 (libtorrent-0.13.2.tar.gz) = ed2f2dea16c29cac63fa2724f6658786d955f975861fa6811bcf1597ff8a5e4f
+SIZE (libtorrent-0.13.2.tar.gz) = 725088
